title: AI API Playbook: Production Patterns, Provider Examples, and Commercial Blueprints
description: A reproducible, provider-aware reference implementation for building, evaluating, securing, and commercializing AI API applications. Includes tested Python abstractions, runnable examples, project blueprints, a Colab notebook, and a 100-page infographic book production map.
notes: Replace OWNER/REPOSITORY after publishing to GitHub. Add the author's ORCID in Zenodo before the first release if available.
